title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 26 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 26 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 26 2026
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 26/02/2026
DCE iron ore futures were in the doldrums today, with the most-traded contract I2605 closing flat at 748.5 yuan/mt.Spot prices fell 2-4 yuan/mt from the previous trading day. Traders showed moderate enthusiasm in offering, while steel mills inquired less actively, though the spot transaction atmosphere improved slightly. The latest SMM data showed that inventories of ten ports totaled 118.87 million mt, up 1.80% WoW from pre-holiday levels.
